texto: You mustn't get so upset about what you feel, Spud. No one's a hundred per cent consistent all the time. We might like to be. We can plan our lives along certain lines. But you know, there's no future in screwing down all the pressure valves and smashing in the gauge. You can do it for a bit and then something goes. Sometimes it gets that the only thing is just to say, 'That's what I'd like to feel twenty-four hours a day; but, the hell with it, this is how I feel now.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Mary Renault: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de passagem do tempo e prioridades. O trecho “You mustn't get so upset about what you feel, Spud. No one's a hundred per cent consistent all th…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, perseverance, mustn pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao.

frase_original: You mustn't get so upset about what you feel, Spud. No one's a hundred per cent consistent all the time. We might like to be. We can plan our lives along certain lines. But you know, there's no future in screwing down all the pressure valves and smashing in the gauge. You can do it for a bit and then something goes. Sometimes it gets that the only thing is just to say, 'That's what I'd like to feel twenty-four hours a day; but, the hell with it, this is how I feel now.

texto: It's only since it's been made impossible that it's been made so damn easy. It's got like prohibition, with bums and crooks making fortunes out of hooch, everyone who might have had a palate losing it, nobody caring how you hold your liquor, you've been smart enough if you get it at all. You can't make good wine in a bathtub in the cellar, you need sun and rain and fresh air, you need pride in a job you can tell the world about. Only you can live without drink if you have to, but you can't live without love.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Mary Renault: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “It's only since it's been made impossible that it's been made so damn easy. It's got like prohibi…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que inteligencia, closets, love pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de dia-chuvoso e love.
